welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.intro: Together with our families, we invite you to celebrate our wedding.
welcome.body: We are looking forward to seeing you on the 12th of June 2027. The ceremony will take place at Phoenix Cernica, Strada Strandului 62, 077145 Pantelimon, Romania at 17:30.

form.homeAddressLabel: Your home address: We would like to send you an invite by post
form.messagePlaceholder: Write a message or any special note…
form.starterNote: A selection of canapés and starters will be served.
starters: Brie cheese tartlet with redcurrant jam
Goose and chicken liver terrine with candied fruit and orange chutney with chilli
Cheese roulade with grapes in baked walnut crust
Canapé cups with pike roe and chives
Fig with goat cheese and almond flakes
Cherry tomatoes with mozzarella and basil
mainCourseItems: Fish Course: Sea bream fillet with lemon butter sauce served with white risotto
Traditional Course: Cabbage rolls with polenta, bacon, sour cream and hot pepper
Main Course: Duck confit leg served with celeriac purée and pear in red wine sauce
drinksMenuItems: Welcome Drink: Sparkling wine on guest arrival and served with the cake
Whisky: Jameson, JB, Ballantine's, Chivas Regal
Cocktails: Aperol Spritz, Hugo, Mojito, Campari Orange, Gin & Tonic, Cuba Libre
Non-alcoholic cocktails: Safe Sex, Virgin Piña Colada, Green Apple
Prosecco | Romanian white, rosé and red wine (Sarica Niculinel Aniversarium range)
Soft Drinks: Pepsi, Mirinda, 7UP, Evervess | Still and sparkling Aqua Carpatica water (0.5L) | Santal juices: orange, apple, peach, cranberry
Hot Drinks: Espresso, cappuccino, caffè latte
form.gdpr: I agree to my personal data being stored and used solely for the purpose of organising this wedding event, in accordance with GDPR.

accommodation.title: Hotels & Accommodation

honeymoon.title: Honeymoon Fund
honeymoon.body:
Your presence, your good mood and your desire to celebrate our union are all we wish for on this special day.
We are not doing a wedding gift list, but if you would like to give us a small gift, we are planning a trip for our honeymoon.
You can contribute to our project either online by clicking on the Contribute button below, or through the gift box available at the reception venue on the wedding day.
honeymoon.wishPlaceholder: Write a heartfelt wish for René & Ramona…

parking.title: Parking & Travelling back to Bucharest
parking.subtitle: Parking & Travelling back to Bucharest after the party
parking.body: The parking is located 100 metres from the restaurant Garuda By Phoenix Cernica. Our teams and staff will help guiding you and park your car. Uber and Bolt are widely available to travel back to Bucharest after the party.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.address: Flat 43, High St, Brentford TW8 0FR, United Kingdom
